sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Guard Technique
special_mechanics.description: Allows player to block projectiles launched at protagonist; ineffective against melee attacks

special_mechanics.name: Variable Attack System
special_mechanics.description: Different techniques available depending on whether protagonist is running, jumping, attacking, or using combinations of these three actions. Each attack meant for dealing more damage to certain enemy kinds, though often minimal difference in effect.

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Available sources document game systems, unused items, debug features, and general gameplay mechanics, but contain no quantitative movement physics parameters, velocity values, acceleration rates, gravity constants, or sub-pixel precision data. Physics feel must be inferred from gameplay descriptions only.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Terranigma article
